title: Mod Garden: Nature
description: The modpack for the Mod Garden: Nature event.
body:
Welcome to The Yuukaflower Forest National Park - Where Nature Awaits
A collaboration between 24 modders, as hosted by Mod Garden.
--- **Mod Garden: Nature** was a mod development jam that ran from May 17th, 2025 through October 9th, 2025. This modpack contains all submissions, and will later contain a showcase world. **Key Features**: - Witness the dawn of 11 mods, including Abysm, Minty Blends, and There's Always a Bigger Fish! - Explore the serene wild of Yuukaflower National Park, or stay the night in a cabin. - Find and earn 24 collectible shards, tracking booth visits, exploration, and mastery! - Discover secrets hidden behind every hedge and spot of green (or pale grey!)

What will you discover?
--- Mod Garden is made possible by the modding community.
A full list of credits for each submitted mod can be found on the [submissions page](https://modgarden.net/events/mod-garden/nature). This modpack and world was originally showcased on a multiplayer server in the fall of 2025.
Check out the [Mod Garden website](https://modgarden.net) to see more events, or join [our discord](https://discord.modgarden.net/) to tour or participate in the next event live!
